vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing

parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Servo pockets, control horns, pushrod/linkage channels
physics_paths: Load path: Servo load transferred to wing structure via servo pocket and control horn
Flow path: Control signals from flight controller to servo via connector mate
Thermal path: Heat dissipation from servo to ambient air via open channels
Motion path: Control horn movement translates servo rotation to elevon deflection
Pressure path: Aerodynamic pressure on wing transferred to elevon via control horn
integration_opportunities: Servo_mounting_flange can integrate with wing spar for structural reinforcement
Control_horn_socket can be optimized for specific control horn geometry
Harness_channel can be designed for easy cable routing and strain relief
Pushrod_channel can be adjusted for optimal linkage length and clearance
Access_cover can be made removable for maintenance and inspection
verification_focus: Mass verification: Ensure total mass does not exceed 100g
Structural integrity: Verify servo mounting flange can handle specified loads
Electrical connectivity: Confirm harness passthrough maintains signal integrity
Mechanical fit: Validate press-fit between control horn socket and control horn

risk.desc: Potential thermal issues due to limited airflow in tight spaces.
risk.mit: Add vent holes near the top access hatch for passive cooling.

risk.desc: Risk of improper connector mating due to lack of clear labeling.

risk.mit: Implement strain relief geometry at every cable exit point.

risk.desc: Potential difficulty in accessing balance leads through the window.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the balance lead window for better accessibility.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure if bolts are not torqued correctly.
risk.mit: Include torque specifications in assembly instructions and conduct regular inspections.
